context: This chapter describes the proper cremation rites and funeral procedures. It details how to prepare the body for cremation, construct the funeral pyre, recite the appropriate mantras, collect the ashes, and immerse them in sacred rivers for the liberation of the departed soul.

verses.hindi:
गरुड उवाच —
मृतस्य संस्कारविधिं वद विष्णो जगत्पते ।
येन सम्यक् कृतेनासौ सद्गतिं प्राप्नुयान्नरः ॥
verses.transliteration:
Garuda uvācha —
mṛtasya saṃskāra-vidhiṃ vada viṣṇo jagatpate |
yena samyak kṛtenāsau sadgatiṃ prāpnuyān naraḥ ||
verses.translation: Garuda said: O Vishnu, Lord of the universe, describe to me the proper rites for the dead, by the correct performance of which a person may attain a good destiny.

verses.hindi:
श्रीभगवानुवाच —
शृणु तार्क्ष्य प्रवक्ष्यामि संस्कारं प्रेतमुक्तिदम् ।
यच्छ्रुत्वा सर्वपापेभ्यो मुच्यते नात्र संशयः ॥
verses.transliteration:
Śrī Bhagavān uvācha —
śṛṇu tārkṣya pravakṣyāmi saṃskāraṃ preta-muktidam |
yacchrutvā sarva-pāpebhyo muchyate nātra saṃśayaḥ ||
verses.translation: The Blessed Lord said: Listen, O Tarkhsya, I shall describe the funeral rites that grant liberation to the departed. By hearing this, one is freed from all sins — there is no doubt.

verses.hindi:
मृतं शरीरं स्नापयेत् सुगन्धैः शुद्धवारिभिः ।
गङ्गाजलेन वा तोयैः तीर्थजैश्च विशेषतः ॥
verses.transliteration:
mṛtaṃ śarīraṃ snāpayet sugandhaiḥ śuddha-vāribhiḥ |
gaṅgā-jalena vā toyaiḥ tīrthajaiśca viśeṣataḥ ||
verses.translation: The dead body should be bathed with fragrant and pure water, especially with water from the Ganges or from other sacred pilgrimage places.

verses.hindi:
नवं वस्त्रं परीधाप्य चन्दनेनानुलेपयेत् ।
तिलकं भालदेशे तु कुशैः संवेष्ट्य सर्वतः ॥
verses.transliteration:
navaṃ vastraṃ parīdhāpya chandanenānulepayet |
tilakaṃ bhāla-deśe tu kuśaiḥ saṃveṣṭya sarvataḥ ||
verses.translation: Having clothed the body in new garments and anointed it with sandalwood paste, a tilaka mark should be placed on the forehead, and the body should be wrapped all around with kusha grass.

verses.hindi:
उत्तरासनगं कुर्याद् द्विजाति यदि मृत्युभाक् ।
अग्निहोत्री गृहस्थश्चेद् अग्निना दाहयेत् सुतः ॥
verses.transliteration:
uttarāsana-gaṃ kuryād dvijāti yadi mṛtyubhāk |
agnihotrī gṛhasthośched agninā dāhayet sutaḥ ||
verses.translation: The body should be placed facing north. If the deceased was a twice-born householder who maintained the sacred fire, the son should perform the cremation with that very fire.

verses.hindi:
शवयानं समारोप्य रामनामानि कीर्तयन् ।
श्मशानं नयनं कुर्यात् ज्येष्ठपुत्रः समाहितः ॥
verses.transliteration:
śava-yānaṃ samāropya rāma-nāmāni kīrtayan |
śmaśānaṃ nayanaṃ kuryāt jyeṣṭha-putraḥ samāhitaḥ ||
verses.translation: Placing the body on the funeral bier, chanting the name of Rama, the eldest son should carry it with concentration to the cremation ground.

verses.hindi:
राम नाम सत्य है, सत्य बोलो गत्य है ।
एवं वदन्ति ये मर्त्या मृतं नयन्ति संस्मरन् ॥
verses.transliteration:
rāma nāma satya hai, satya bolo gatya hai |
evaṃ vadanti ye martyā mṛtaṃ nayanti saṃsmaran ||
verses.translation: 'The name of Rama is Truth, speak Truth for it is the path' — thus do the mortals chant as they carry the dead, remembering the Lord.

verses.hindi:
श्मशाने चिताग्निं तु प्रज्वाल्य विधिपूर्वकम् ।
दक्षिणाशिरसं कृत्वा शवं चित्यां निधापयेत् ॥
verses.transliteration:
śmaśāne citāgniṃ tu prajvālya vidhi-pūrvakam |
dakṣiṇā-śirasaṃ kṛtvā śavaṃ cityāṃ nidhāpayet ||
verses.translation: At the cremation ground, having kindled the pyre fire according to proper rites, the body should be placed on the pyre with its head facing south.

verses.hindi:
चन्दनैश्च घृतैश्चैव तिलैः सर्पिर्भिरेव च ।
चिताग्निं ज्वालयेत् पुत्रः प्रदक्षिणपथे स्थितः ॥
verses.transliteration:
chandanaiśca ghṛtaiścaiva tilaiḥ sarpirbhireva ca |
citāgniṃ jvālayet putraḥ pradakṣiṇa-pathe sthitaḥ ||
verses.translation: With sandalwood, clarified butter, sesame seeds, and ghee, the son should light the funeral pyre while standing on the circumambulatory path.

verses.hindi:
ओं नमो नारायणाय इति मन्त्रं समुच्चरन् ।
त्रिः प्रदक्षिणं कुर्याच्चित्यां दद्याच्च पावकम् ॥
verses.transliteration:
oṃ namo nārāyaṇāya iti mantraṃ samuccharan |
triḥ pradakṣiṇaṃ kuryāccityāṃ dadyācca pāvakam ||
verses.translation: Chanting the mantra 'Om Namo Narayanaya,' he should circumambulate the pyre three times and then apply fire to it.

verses.hindi:
मुखाग्निं दीयते येन पुत्रेण पितुरादरात् ।
स पुत्रः पुत्रधर्मेण पुन्नाम्नो नरकात् त्रायते पितरम् ॥
verses.transliteration:
mukhāgniṃ dīyate yena putreṇa piturādarāt |
sa putraḥ putra-dharmeṇa punnāmno narakāt trāyate pitaram ||
verses.translation: The son who respectfully applies fire to the mouth of his father — that son, by the duty of sonship, saves his father from the hell called 'Put.'

verses.hindi:
कपालक्रिया कार्या ज्वलन्त्यां चितिके सति ।
दग्धे शरीरे विप्राणां घृतधाराः प्रदापयेत् ॥
verses.transliteration:
kapāla-kriyā kāryā jvalantyāṃ citike sati |
dagdhe śarīre viprāṇāṃ ghṛta-dhārāḥ pradāpayet ||
verses.translation: The kapala-kriya (cracking of the skull) should be performed when the pyre is blazing. When the body is being consumed, streams of ghee should be poured for the brahmins' sake.

verses.hindi:
दग्ध्वा शरीरं विधिवत् अस्थीनि च समाहरेत् ।
शुक्लवस्त्रे समावेष्ट्य गन्धपुष्पैरलङ्कृतम् ॥
verses.transliteration:
dagdhvā śarīraṃ vidhivat asthīni ca samāharet |
śukla-vastre samāveṣṭya gandha-puṣpair alaṅkṛtam ||
verses.translation: Having cremated the body according to the rites, the bones should be collected, wrapped in white cloth, and adorned with fragrant flowers.

verses.hindi:
गङ्गायां वा सरय्वां वा नर्मदायां विशेषतः ।
अस्थिविसर्जनं कुर्यात् तीर्थक्षेत्रे विधानतः ॥
verses.transliteration:
gaṅgāyāṃ vā sarayvāṃ vā narmadāyāṃ viśeṣataḥ |
asthi-visarjanaṃ kuryāt tīrtha-kṣetre vidhānataḥ ||
verses.translation: In the Ganges, or in the Sarayu, or especially in the Narmada — the immersion of bones should be performed at a sacred pilgrimage site according to the prescribed rules.

verses.hindi:
गङ्गायामस्थि यस्यास्ति तस्य मुक्तिर्न संशयः ।
यावदस्थि जले तिष्ठेत् तावत् स्वर्गे महीयते ॥
verses.transliteration:
gaṅgāyām asthi yasyāsti tasya muktir na saṃśayaḥ |
yāvad asthi jale tiṣṭhet tāvat svarge mahīyate ||
verses.translation: He whose bones rest in the Ganges — his liberation is certain, there is no doubt. As long as the bones remain in the water, so long is he honored in heaven.

verses.hindi:
स्नात्वा शुचिर्भूत्वा सर्वे बान्धवाः सहिताः ततः ।
तिलोदकं प्रदद्यात् स प्रेताय विधिवत् ततः ॥
verses.transliteration:
snātvā śucirbhūtvā sarve bāndhavāḥ sahitāḥ tataḥ |
tilodakaṃ pradadyāt sa pretāya vidhivat tataḥ ||
verses.translation: Having bathed and become purified, all the relatives together should then offer water mixed with sesame seeds to the departed soul according to the prescribed rites.

verses.hindi:
श्मशानाद् गृहमागत्य निम्बपत्रं च चर्वयेत् ।
शुद्धिं गत्वा ततः पश्चात् प्रेताय जलमर्पयेत् ॥
verses.transliteration:
śmaśānād gṛham āgatya nimba-patraṃ ca carvayet |
śuddhiṃ gatvā tataḥ paścāt pretāya jalam arpayet ||
verses.translation: Upon returning home from the cremation ground, one should chew neem leaves. Having thus purified oneself, one should then offer water to the departed soul.

verses.hindi:
दीपदानं प्रकुर्वीत प्रेतस्य पथि सर्वदा ।
दशाहं पथि दीपेन प्रेतोऽन्धतमसि स्थितः ॥
verses.transliteration:
dīpa-dānaṃ prakurvīta pretasya pathi sarvadā |
daśāhaṃ pathi dīpena preto'ndha-tamasi sthitaḥ ||
verses.translation: A lamp should always be placed on the path for the departed spirit. For ten days a lamp on the path is needed, for the spirit dwells in utter darkness.

verses.hindi:
घटं सजलं संस्थाप्य तिलपात्रं च दापयेत् ।
प्रेताय दीपदानेन अन्धकारो विनश्यति ॥
verses.transliteration:
ghaṭaṃ sa-jalaṃ saṃsthāpya tila-pātraṃ ca dāpayet |
pretāya dīpa-dānena andhakāro vinaśyati ||
verses.translation: A pot filled with water should be placed, and a vessel of sesame should be offered. By the gift of a lamp to the departed, the darkness is destroyed.

verses.hindi:
एवं संस्कारविधिना यो मृतं संस्करोति वै ।
स पुत्रः पितृभक्तश्च स्वर्गलोकं स गच्छति ॥
verses.transliteration:
evaṃ saṃskāra-vidhinā yo mṛtaṃ saṃskaroti vai |
sa putraḥ pitṛ-bhaktaśca svarga-lokaṃ sa gacchati ||
verses.translation: He who thus performs the funeral rites for the dead according to the prescribed procedure — that devoted son goes to the heavenly realm.

verses.hindi:
संस्कारहीनो यो मृतः स भवेत् प्रेत एव हि ।
तस्मात् सर्वप्रयत्नेन संस्कारं कारयेत् सुतः ॥
verses.transliteration:
saṃskāra-hīno yo mṛtaḥ sa bhavet preta eva hi |
tasmāt sarva-prayatnena saṃskāraṃ kārayet sutaḥ ||
verses.translation: He who dies without proper funeral rites indeed remains a restless spirit. Therefore, with every effort, the son should ensure the performance of the funeral rites.
